title: pitcairnia neeana
intro: Pitcairnia neeana is a species of plant in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the Nee's Airplant or Pineapple Plant, which is native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
